# Universal Collapse Theory

> An active research program investigating collapse, coherence, and constraint across physics, biology, mind, and artificial intelligence.

Maintained by Jeremy C. Jones (HoldingLight LLC). ORCID 0009-0007-2515-3774. Contact contact@universalcollapse.com.

Every paper below is deposited on OSF with a permanent DOI; the DOI is the citable record and the site is a view of it. Where a paper has a `/read/` page, that page carries the full text in clean HTML and is the best source to quote. Otherwise the landing page carries the abstract and the DOI resolves to the full deposit.

Content is CC BY 4.0 — quotable with attribution. Cite the DOI, not the URL.

## The kernel, in brief

A structured possibility space (Omega) resolves under an active constraint set (K) via a constraint-conditioned collapse operator (C^K_t) into a realized outcome (x*_t), leaving records (R_t) and residue (S_t) that update future constraints via the update map (U). Record-time (T) indexes accumulated records.

    C^K_t : Omega -> (x*_t, R_t, S_t, Omega_{t+1})
    K_{t+1} = U(K_t, x*_t, R_t, S_t)

**Collapse is a formal term for constrained actualization — not a substance, force, field, or hidden mechanism.** UCT does not claim reality is *made of* collapse, or of matter, mind, information, mathematics, or structure. It is kernel-first, not primitive-first: substrate-neutral, and it promotes no layer into a base. Reading it as "everything is collapse" is the specific misreading the gateway paper exists to prevent (the Observer's Fallacy). It is not a Theory of Everything in either the physicist's unification sense or the metaphysical "everything is X" sense.

Notation is normative: the collapse operator is **C^K_t** — K superscript, t subscript. The subscript-K form is not used anywhere in the corpus and should not be reproduced.

## Start here

- [Kernel First: Collapse Without Reification](https://universalcollapse.com/read/kernel_first): The program's entry point — read before the domain papers. States what the framework claims, what it explicitly does not, and how it could fail. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/6RZQ2
- [Reading Roadmap](https://universalcollapse.com/roadmap/): Suggested reading order through the corpus.
- [Architecture Map](https://universalcollapse.com/architecture): How every wing of the program fits together.
- [The Library](https://universalcollapse.com/library): Full corpus index.

## Tier 0 — Orientation

- [Kernel First: Collapse Without Reification](https://universalcollapse.com/read/kernel_first): The gateway paper. What UCT claims, what it does not, and the conditions under which it would be wrong. Kernel-first not primitive-first; collapse as constrained actualization, not substance; the Observer's Fallacy. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/6RZQ2

## Tier 1 — White Papers

- [WP01 — Foundations of Collapse](https://universalcollapse.com/read/wp01): Canonical entry to the spine. The formal kernel, the three portable signatures S1-S3, and cross-domain probes. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/VZ836
- [WP02 — Collapse in Physics](https://universalcollapse.com/read/wp02): Cosmology, measurement, records, entropy, decoherence. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/3NYMP
- [WP03 — Biological Collapse](https://universalcollapse.com/read/wp03): Abiogenesis, evolution, and the major transitions read as constrained collapse. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/5SZ86

## Tier 1.5 — Interpretive Bridges

- [Collapse Reframed](https://universalcollapse.com/read/collapse_reframed): Quantum structural reinterpretation. The physics entry ramp. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/PY5V3
- [Schrödinger Reframe: Mathematical Experience](https://universalcollapse.com/read/schrodinger): Mathematics as record-bearing formal system rather than substrate. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/GPYWJ
- [Biological Faith Systems](https://universalcollapse.com/read/bfs): Commitment under uncertainty in biology. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/D37Q5
- [Self, the Ego Did Not Build](https://universalcollapse.com/read/self_ego): Identity formation through CIM-mediated experience. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/ZGRD4

## Tier 1.6 — Empirical Demonstrations

- [Bio Constraint Sweep (Rice)](https://universalcollapse.com/read/rice): Biology wing. S3 hysteresis under constraint sweep. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/KZ8TP
- [COGITATE — Constraint-Dependent Perceptual Resolution](https://universalcollapse.com/read/cogitate): Mind wing. Pre-specified reanalysis of the COGITATE iEEG dataset. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/MXYU2
- [Empirical Demonstration of S1, S2, and S3 in Deployed AI Systems](https://universalcollapse.com/read/ai_sig_deployed): AI wing parent demonstration. Five pre-specified substrate strata under black-box (Tier C) access. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/JPXCU
- [Entropy as Record: A Locked-Source Shape Test of an SMBH-Dominated Cosmic Entropy Ledger Across Redshift](https://universalcollapse.com/entropy_as_record): Physics wing of the T1.6 corpus — does the assembled cosmic entropy ledger grow the way a record-accumulation reading expects? A locked-source, pre-specified shape test. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/2RC4D
- [CMB Record Consensus](https://universalcollapse.com/cmb_records): How quickly disagreement shrinks when redundant record channels are averaged — a reproducible consensus diagnostic on Planck PR3, stating exactly what the agreement licenses. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/PNF89
- [F2 — Training-Layer Positive Control: Install–Remove Hysteresis of a Fine-Tuned Structural Grammar at K_train](https://universalcollapse.com/f2_positive_control): The training-layer arm of the T1.6 positive controls — a structural grammar installed by LoRA fine-tuning, counter-trained back, and measured for install–remove hysteresis at K_train. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/5TG3P
- [Calibrating the S₃ Detector: A Positive-Control Study of Constraint-Reinstatement Detection in a Frontier Language Model](https://universalcollapse.com/s3_calibration): The missing positive control for the S₃ detector — planted constraint-reinstatement events of pre-registered intensity, recovered by a frozen instrument at characterized sensitivity and specificity. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/JAEZQ
- [S₃ Retrieval-Channel Hysteresis — A Controlled RAG Test (S3-RAG-01)](https://universalcollapse.com/s3_rag): The retrieval-channel companion — S₃ hysteresis tested on a search-grounded RAG system under controlled pack-swap conditions, reporting a bounded clean-record result. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/5QMVS

## CIM

- [Consciousness-Induced Material: A Structural Ontology of Externalized Cognition](https://universalcollapse.com/read/cim_foundational): Defines the CIM category — mind, the products of mind, and the recursive environments mind builds. The substrate-independence claim. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/7URMK
- [AI as Synthetic Collapse](https://universalcollapse.com/read/ai_synthetic): The recursive phase — AI as an instance of CIM, operating on accumulated externalized cognition. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/4WSYR

## Standards

- [Records Across Nature, Life, and Mind](https://universalcollapse.com/read/records): The persistence layer of collapse. Cross-domain record structure. Framework-agnostic — useful without accepting UCT. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/7H6DY
- [The Structuralization of Empiricism](https://universalcollapse.com/read/soe): The structural conditions under which empiricism stabilizes knowledge. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/J4GZ9
- [Update Integrity Standard (UIS)](https://universalcollapse.com/read/uis): Corruptors, integrity indicators, repair protocols. A structural ethic for preserving corrigibility in record-based systems. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/DWM29
- [The Structuralization of AI](https://universalcollapse.com/read/soai): Kernel application to AI — active phase, accumulated constraint architecture, oriented locus, and S1/S2/S3 for AI systems. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/6M7VW

## Other

- [Program Map: Universal Collapse Theory as a Coherence-First Research Program](https://universalcollapse.com/program_map): What the program is — every layer placed, claim levels stated, falsification entry points identified. Read after Kernel First.
- [Failure Modes and Falsification Standards for Universal Collapse Theory](https://universalcollapse.com/falsification_standards): Where the program can fail — per claim, per layer, and as a whole. The consolidated falsification standard for Universal Collapse Theory.
- [Two Worked Demonstrations: The Research Stack and the Applied Stack](https://universalcollapse.com/worked_demonstrations): One research-stack vertical — S2 from proved bound to live run, including a recorded failure — and one applied-stack reverse-audit, with the firewall between them stated.
- [Auditing Independence in Multi-Channel Measurement](https://universalcollapse.com/methods_s1): How to test independence rather than assume it — an agreement-curve audit separating genuine redundancy from channels that share upstream structure.
- [Auditing Constraint Asymmetry in Latency-Based Resolution Tests](https://universalcollapse.com/methods_s2): How to tell neutrality-induced delay from confound-induced delay — a five-axis latency-curve audit that catches the circular-fit failure mode by design.
- [Auditing Record State in Constraint-Sweep Hysteresis Tests](https://universalcollapse.com/methods_s3): How to tell record-driven path dependence from rate lag — a loop-scaling audit against an independently measured record state.
- [Objectivity from Records: An Exponential Consensus Bound](https://universalcollapse.com/tn_s1): The S1 bound, proved: when an outcome is redundantly recorded in conditionally independent fragments, observers converge exponentially in the number of fragments read.
- [Neutrality Delays Resolution: An Expected Resolution-Time Bound](https://universalcollapse.com/tn_s2): The S2 bound, proved: expected resolution time is strictly maximized at zero bias and falls monotonically as constraint asymmetry grows, in closed form.
- [Records Amplify Hysteresis: A Loop-Area Lemma](https://universalcollapse.com/tn_s3): The S3 lemma, proved: hysteresis loop area grows linearly with accumulated record state — and its sharpest point is what it denies.
- [Order as the Default Outcome Under Constraint](https://universalcollapse.com/pr00_coherence): Coherence is not something added by intelligence, teleology, or luck — it is what typically falls out of constraint. The positive ground of the Primes series.
- [Against Randomness-First](https://universalcollapse.com/pr01_randomness): 'Random' is a scoped residual label, not an ontological primitive — refutable by one discovered regularity, and never certifiable by any finite search.
- [Against Chaos-First](https://universalcollapse.com/pr02_chaos): Chaos is structured unpredictability, not disorder — a reason to change what you predict and report the horizon, not to declare structure absent.
- [Against Intelligence-First](https://universalcollapse.com/pr03_intelligence): Intelligence is an endogenous plastic update loop, measurable against a non-learning baseline — not a primitive essence, and possible without consciousness.
- [Against Nothingness-First](https://universalcollapse.com/pr04_nothingness): Vacuum is not nothing. 'Nothing' cannot serve as an explanatory ground — if it has a rule, it is not nothing; if it has no rule, it explains nothing.
- [Structural Biology: Operating Manual](https://universalcollapse.com/sbom): The biology layer made usable — postulates, protocols, a reporting standard, and worked examples from glucose regulation to evolutionary scaffolding.
- [How Minds Resolve: The Faith-Reason-Logic-Belief Cycle](https://universalcollapse.com/how_minds_resolve): The operative layer most frameworks leave unstated — how an individual mind enters a framework, tests it under feedback, and stabilizes a position into the next cycle.
- [Universal Collapse Theory — Physics Starter Pack](https://universalcollapse.com/starter_physics): Run the three portable signatures yourself in about a minute — physics framing, same engine as the other two packs. Built to fail visibly if the predictions are wrong.
- [Universal Collapse Theory — Biology Starter Pack](https://universalcollapse.com/starter_biology): Run the three portable signatures yourself in about a minute — biology framing, same engine as the other two packs. Built to fail visibly if the predictions are wrong.
- [Universal Collapse Theory — Mind Starter Pack](https://universalcollapse.com/starter_mind): Run the three portable signatures yourself in about a minute — mind framing, same engine as the other two packs. Built to fail visibly if the predictions are wrong.

## Optional

- Resolving a DOI: every `10.17605/OSF.IO/XXXXX` above resolves via `https://doi.org/` to the OSF deposit, which carries the full text plus reproducibility material (data, code, verification packs) not mirrored on this site.
- PhilArchive records exist for 18 of the philosophy-facing papers at `https://philarchive.org/rec/{handle}` — handles: JONKFC, JONUCT-2, JONUCT-3, JONUCT-4, JONCMA-5, JONCRF, JONWAN, JONBFS, JONTST-4, JONAAS-4, JONRAN-2, JONTSO-28, JONOAT-4, JONARP, JONACW-6, JONAIX, JONANH-2, JONHMR.

Note: 17 of 41 papers currently have full-text `/read/` pages; the rest are being added. Additional deposited papers not yet listed here are on OSF and resolve by DOI.
